channel.title: SSbreakingSectionTwo
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingSectionTwo, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: An Independent Senate Hopeful Tries to Scare Off Montana Democrats
item.description: Seth Bodnar, an independent, could have the best chance of breaking the Republican stranglehold in Montana, but the state’s Democrats are choosing to ...

item.title: The Iran War just made the clean energy transition non-negotiable
item.description: I've spent 20 years making the economic case for clean energy. Hormuz just made the geopolitical case — at the cost of many lives and $126-a-barrel oi...

item.title: Mamdani Considers Delaying Pension-Fund Payments to Ease Budget Gap
item.description: With New York City facing a multibillion-dollar deficit, Mayor Zohran Mamdani is exploring ways to delay the city’s payments to municipal pension fund...

item.title: Combative, Defensive and Occasionally Contrite, Kennedy Walks a Fine Line
item.description: In four days of congressional testimony, the health secretary sought to please the White House and his MAHA base at the same time.

item.title: Candidates for California Governor Debate: 5 Takeaways
item.description: The nonpartisan primary remains volatile after the departure of Eric Swalwell. A televised debate featured six leading candidates, but produced few fi...

item.title: Stephen and Ayesha Curry talk about the one habit that separates good business leaders from great ones
item.description: The Currys, co-founders of Plezi Hydration, discuss leading with purpose.

item.title: Current price of oil as of April 23, 2026
item.description: When oil prices change, it affects your energy costs—and even the price of everyday items. Here’s why.

item.title: Michael Tilson Thomas, Celebrated American Conductor, Dies at 81
item.description: A galvanizing force in classical music as a conductor, composer, pianist and evangelist, he spent 25 years as music director of the San Francisco Symp...

item.title: Goldman tackles AI’s missing link: the ‘world model’ that every AI godfather is racing to figure out
item.description: The researchers who built modern AI say it's still missing something fundamental. Goldman Sachs explains what—and why the answer could reshape everyth...

item.title: Inflated AI claims are under fire—and the regulatory reckoning is coming
item.description: A top securities litigation partner at Baker McKenzie argues that history—from dot-com fraud to ESG greenwashing—tells us exactly where AI disclosure ...

item.title: How People in Lebanon Are Reacting to Talks With Israel
item.description: The Lebanese are deeply divided over whether rare direct talks with Israel are a good thing.

item.title: Germany, a Steadfast Ally of Israel, Now Voices Some Frustration
item.description: In recent weeks, German officials have issued critical comments about Israel that convey Berlin’s recent frustration with its longtime ally.

item.title: U.S. forces stop a second tanker they say is carrying Iranian oil.
Iran War Live Updates: Trump Threatens Iranian Boats He Says Are Mining the Strait of Hormuz
item.description: President Trump’s latest threats came after the Pentagon said the U.S. military had boarded a second tanker carrying oil from Iran. Both sides are try...
